fixture: 031_comparison_literals

statement 1:
  sql:
    SELECT 1 = 1
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] true

statement 2:
  sql:
    SELECT 1 <> 2
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] true

statement 3:
  sql:
    SELECT 2 > 1
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] true

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT 2 <= 2
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] true

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT 3 >= 4
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] false
